sections.label: Verse 1
lines: I kimmkot teng kilawmna, Innkuan ki-it leng,
Aw ging khempeuh lungdamna, Innkuan ki-it leng,
Lungnopna leh kicinna, Kiheina teng maitai na,
Hun khempeuh nuam mahmah a, Innkuan ki-it leng.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Bukno khat sung zong nuamna, Innkuan ki-it leng,
Huatna en’na omlohna, Innkuan ki-it leng,
I pai-na tengah nuamna, Leitung khempeuh lungdamna,
Lungdamna dim nuntakna, Innkuan ki-it leng.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Pasian zong hong lungdampih, Innkuan ki-it leng,
Leitung teng ki-itna dim, Innkuan ki-it leng,
Lui-ging bek zong la ngaihpi, Vandum bek zong maitaiina,
Pasian vanpan hong nuihpih, Innkuan ki-it leng.
